headline: Can Devon's Multi-Basin Assets Sustain Growth for Years to Come?
summary: DVN's diversified shale assets, disciplined capital allocation and resilient cash flows support its long-term growth and shareholder return prospects.

headline: How to Maximize Your Retirement Portfolio with These Top-Ranked Dividend Stocks
summary: The traditional retirement planning approaches no longer cover all expenses in nest egg years. So what can retirees do? Thankfully, there are alternative investments that provide steady, higher-rate income streams to replace dwindling bond yields.

headline: Devon Energy (DVN) Maps Out 2026 Production After The Coterra Merger
summary: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) has issued new production guidance for 2026 following its merger with Coterra Energy. The company outlined how the combined business plans to concentrate capital on high-return assets, with emphasis on the Permian Basin. The roadmap also highlights a continued focus on shareholder returns through dividends and share repurchase activity. Devon Energy now looks different after absorbing Coterra Energy, and the latest 2026 production guidance shows how the combined...

headline: Western Midstream Expands Permian Water Recycling With New Treatment Plant
summary: Western Midstream and a consortium of major oil producers have commissioned a second produced-water treatment facility in the Permian Basin designed to significantly expand freshwater recovery from oilfield wastewater.

raw.headline: Western Midstream Expands Permian Water Recycling With New Treatment Plant

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - June 2026 Breakdown
summary: SCHD delivered a return of almost 3% in the past month, extending its lead over the S&P 500 ETF Trust, SPY. Read more on the holdings of SCHD here.
